stamp.title: 1c Green Washington
stamp.summary: Washington-Franklin issue, 1c green. Handwritten label indicates Scott 448 (coil), but stamp is perforated on all four sides. Used.

stamp.title: 2c Red Washington Coil
stamp.summary: Washington-Franklin issue, 2c red, flat plate horizontal coil (perforated vertically, imperforate top and bottom). Perf 10. Used with bars cancel.

stamp.title: 2c Red Washington Coil
stamp.summary: Washington-Franklin issue, 2c red, rotary press horizontal coil (perforated vertically, imperforate top and bottom). Perf 10. Used with bars cancel.

stamp.title: 4c Brown Washington
stamp.summary: Washington-Franklin issue, 4c brown. Handwritten label indicates Scott 457 (coil), but stamp is perforated on all four sides. Used.

stamp.title: 5c Blue Washington
stamp.summary: Washington-Franklin issue, 5c blue. Handwritten label indicates Scott 458 (coil), but stamp is perforated on all four sides. Used.

stamp.title: 4c Brown Washington Perf 11
stamp.summary: Washington-Franklin issue, 4c brown, flat plate. Perf 11. Used with circular datestamp.

stamp.title: 5c Blue Washington Perf 11
stamp.summary: Washington-Franklin issue, 5c blue, flat plate. Perf 11. Used with wavy line machine cancel.

stamp.title: 8c Olive-Green Franklin Perf 11
stamp.summary: Washington-Franklin issue, 8c olive-green, flat plate. Perf 11. Used.

stamp.title: 9c Salmon Franklin Perf 11
stamp.summary: Washington-Franklin issue, 9c salmon-red, flat plate. Perf 11. Used with circular datestamp.

stamp.title: 12c Claret Franklin Perf 11
stamp.summary: Washington-Franklin issue, 12c claret, flat plate. Perf 11. Used with Southbridge, Massachusetts precancel.

stamp.title: 3c Violet Washington
stamp.summary: Washington-Franklin issue, 3c violet. Handwritten label indicates Scott 493 (coil), but stamp is perforated on all four sides. Grand Central Station (G.C. STA) NY cancel.
